assertions.title: Initial Topic Selection

steps.expected: Topic selection UI shows all 10 lectures

steps.observed: 6 topics: Advanced Topics, Assembly Basics, Control Flow, Data Representation, I/O Operations, Procedures
Advanced Topics 25, Assembly Basics 10, Control Flow 10, Data Representation 5, I/O Operations 2, Procedures 7

evidence.playwrightOutput: Topics found: 6 - Advanced Topics25 questions available, Assembly Basics10 questions available, Control Flow10 questions available, Data Representation5 questions available, I/O Operations2 questions available, Procedures7 questions available

assertions.issues: Topic selection shows 6 topic categories instead of 10 lectures from course-map.json. The 6 topics are concept categories, not individual lectures.

assertions.title: Mistake Pattern Detection

steps.action: Select all topics and start diagnostic
steps.observed: Diagnostic starts but browser automation issues prevent reliable flow completion

steps.action: Answer questions and check pattern detection
steps.observed: Could not complete full diagnostic due to click/interaction issues

evidence.playwrightOutput: Started diagnostic, saw questions about INT 21h and ADC instruction

assertions.issues: Browser automation via agent-browser CLI has click/interaction issues in PowerShell. Could not reliably complete a full diagnostic session to test mistake pattern detection. Playwright test shows diagnostic questions load correctly but answer submission is unreliable.

assertions.title: View Report Button

steps.observed: Could not complete diagnostic due to browser automation issues

assertions.issues: Cannot test View Report button without completing a full diagnostic session.

assertions.title: Diagnostic History Saved to IndexedDB

steps.observed: Database exists (ACS2906Learning, version 10) but could not query contents due to async IndexedDB API issues
Could not complete diagnostic to test persistence

assertions.issues: Cannot verify IndexedDB persistence without completing a diagnostic session. IndexedDB API requires async handling which is difficult to test via agent-browser eval.

frictions.description: agent-browser click commands fail in PowerShell due to argument parsing issues
frictions.resolution: Tried using @ref syntax, find text, and other approaches. Playwright script worked better but still had issues with answer submission.

frictions.description: IndexedDB async API difficult to test via agent-browser eval
frictions.resolution: Tried multiple approaches including eval with async/await, but PowerShell and heredoc syntax conflicts prevented reliable testing

blockers.description: Browser automation interactions (clicks) are unreliable in PowerShell environment with agent-browser CLI
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Switched to Playwright script which worked better for navigation but still had issues with answer submission in the diagnostic flow

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 failed (P3-DIAG-001: only 6 topics shown instead of 10 lectures), 3 blocked (P3-DIAG-003, P3-DIAG-004, P3-DIAG-006 - all require completing a full diagnostic which is blocked by browser automation issues)
